features.name: Next.js project scaffold
features.spec: Bootstrap Next.js 14 App Router + Tailwind + TypeScript strict + pnpm.
features.test: pnpm dev starts on localhost:3000 without errors

features.name: Font & design token setup
features.spec: Load Instrument Serif, Satoshi, IBM Plex Mono. CSS custom properties matching mockup hex values exactly.
features.test: Fonts render in browser. Color tokens match mockup.

features.name: Navigation
features.spec: Fixed top nav with blur backdrop. Logo, nav links, chat CTA button. Responsive: hide links on mobile.
features.test: Nav is sticky. Links scroll to sections. Chat button opens panel. Mobile hides nav links.

features.name: Hero section
features.spec: 2-col grid: text + photo. Badge, H1, subtitle, desc, social links. Photo with floating cards. Responsive: 1-col.
features.test: Desktop 2-col, mobile 1-col. All social links correct. Photo loads. Floating cards visible on desktop.

features.name: Metrics strip
features.spec: Dark strip with 5 metrics. Hover lightens cell. Responsive 2-col on small.
features.test: 5 metrics visible. Hover works. Responsive layout correct.

features.name: Strengths section
features.spec: 9 strength cards 3-col grid + 4 gap items 2-col. Hover lift + border effect.
features.test: 9 cards + 4 gaps render. Hover effects work.

features.name: Experience section
features.spec: 4 experience items with sticky meta column + content column. Tags.
features.test: 4 jobs render. Sticky meta on desktop. Tags render.

features.name: Portfolio section
features.spec: 4 portfolio cards 2-col grid. Hover: accent border, lift, top gradient bar. TaskClaw has GitHub link.
features.test: 4 cards render. Hover gradient bar appears. GitHub link correct.

features.name: Skills section
features.spec: 4 skill group cards 2-col. Tag hover to accent.
features.test: 4 groups render. Tag hover works.

features.name: Education & Details section
features.spec: 2-col layout: education left, personal details right.
features.test: All education and detail items render correctly.

features.name: CTA section
features.spec: Dark rounded section. 3 CTAs: Email, LinkedIn, AI Clone.
features.test: Email + LinkedIn links correct. Chat button opens panel.

features.name: Footer
features.spec: Centered links: name, role, email, LinkedIn, GitHub. AI attribution line.
features.test: All links correct.

features.name: Scroll reveal animations
features.spec: IntersectionObserver fade-in + translateY on .reveal elements. Threshold 0.08.
features.test: Elements animate in on scroll. No flash on initial load.

features.name: Chat panel — slide-in UI
features.spec: Fixed panel from right. Overlay + blur. Open/close animation. Header, messages, quick-chips, input+send. Enter to send.
features.test: Panel opens/closes smoothly. Overlay click closes. Enter sends.

features.name: Chat — recruiter name collection
features.spec: First chat state: name input + confirm. After submit: name stored in session.
features.test: Name input appears first. After submit, welcome message uses name.

features.name: Orbital voice intro component
features.spec: Orbital component with pulsing center circle, orbiting tech tags, ElevenLabs audio. Skip button at 5s.
features.test: Orbital renders. Audio plays. Tags orbit. Skip appears at 5s.

features.name: /api/voice-intro endpoint
features.spec: POST /api/voice-intro — { name } → ElevenLabs TTS → stream audio/mpeg. Rate limit: 1/session.
features.test: Returns audio for valid name. Returns 429 on duplicate session request.

features.name: Supabase schema setup
features.spec: Tables: knowledge_chunks, leads. pgvector enabled. match_chunks function.
features.test: Migration SQL created at supabase/migrations/001_init.sql.

features.name: Knowledge ingestion pipeline
features.spec: scripts/ingest.ts — reads knowledge/*.md, chunks, embeds via OpenRouter, upserts to Supabase pgvector.
features.test: pnpm ingest command configured in package.json.

features.name: LangChain RAG agent
features.spec: POST /api/chat — LCEL chain: retrieve 5 chunks → inject context → OpenRouter → stream response.
features.test: Returns relevant answers. Streams tokens.

features.name: System prompt (public)
features.spec: prompts/system.md committed to public repo.
features.test: Prompt readable on GitHub. Agent follows tone rules.

features.name: Guardrails
features.spec: Classify and intercept: salary, injection, brain internals, personal, 20+ messages.
features.test: Each guardrail scenario returns correct response.

features.name: Recruiter interviewing mode
features.spec: After 3-4 recruiter messages, AI naturally asks about the company.
features.test: AI asks a question after 3-4 exchanges. Never asks 2 questions at once.

features.name: Streaming chat UI
features.spec: Client streams tokens from /api/chat via ReadableStream. Typing indicator until first token.
features.test: Tokens stream visibly. Auto-scroll works.

features.name: Session rate limiting
features.spec: Max 20 messages/session. Max 1 voice intro/session.
features.test: 21st message blocked. Voice not re-triggered.

features.name: Exit-intent modal
features.spec: mouseleave on document (desktop only). Once per session. Intent: hiring/consulting. Form. Submit saves to leads.
features.test: Modal on mouse exit. Not on mobile. Lead saves correctly. Only fires once/session.

features.name: Lead notification webhook
features.spec: On new lead: POST to LEAD_NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK (Slack format). No-op if env var empty.
features.test: Webhook fires when env var set. No error when empty.

features.name: PostHog analytics
features.spec: Track: chat_opened, message_sent, exit_intent_shown, lead_captured.
features.test: Analytics provider initialized. Events tracked.

features.name: Knowledge content files
features.spec: Write knowledge/career.md, knowledge/personality.md, knowledge/technical.md, knowledge/faq.md.
features.test: All 4 files created with Fernando's real content.

features.name: README
features.spec: README.md: project overview, local setup, how to update knowledge base, architecture diagram.
features.test: README renders cleanly on GitHub.

features.name: Responsive design pass
features.spec: Full audit at 375px, 768px, 1280px. Chat panel full-width on mobile.
features.test: Playwright screenshots taken at 375x667 and 1280x800.

features.name: Performance & SEO
features.spec: Metadata: title, description. robots.txt. next/image domains configured.
features.test: Metadata set. robots.txt route returns correct content.

features.name: Vercel deployment config
features.spec: vercel.json with env var mapping. Build: pnpm build.
features.test: vercel.json created with all required configuration.

features.name: Security hardening
features.spec: Validate Content-Type on API routes. CORS restricted. Prompt injection detection. Security headers.
features.test: Content-Type validated on all API routes. Security headers in next.config.ts.

features.name: SEO + GEO enhancement
features.spec: Full SEO: Open Graph, Twitter card, keywords, robots meta, canonical URL. GEO: Person + WebSite JSON-LD schema, explicit AI bot allow in robots.txt. Favicon from GitHub avatar. Sitemap.xml auto-generated.
features.test: Build passes. /sitemap.xml, /robots.txt, /icon.png, /apple-icon.png all present. JSON-LD in <head>.

features.name: Dual-target SEO/GEO — Head of AI + AI Engineer
features.spec: Dual-target optimization for 'Head of AI' (1.4K listings) and 'AI Engineer' (10K+ listings) queries. Title/meta/OG/Twitter updated to include AI Engineer. Person schema: fix LinkedIn/GitHub URLs, add worksFor, alumniOf, dual hasOccupation array, expanded knowsAbout (28 terms). FAQ schema (FAQPage JSON-LD, 5 Q&A covering both roles). Hero subtitle + description updated with bridge statement + generative AI keywords. Skills: added Agentic AI, Context Engineering, NLP, Deep Learning, MLOps, AI Governance, AI Enablement, AI Transformation, Digital Transformation, Stakeholder Management, Cross-functional Leadership. Strengths descriptions enriched with leadership/strategy keywords.
features.test: Build passes (pnpm build). TypeScript clean (pnpm typecheck). Three JSON-LD blocks in <head>. Title contains 'AI Engineer'. sameAs points to linkedin.com/in/feott.
